name: MAMMOTH ENERGY SERVICES, INC.
business: MAMMOTH ENERGY SERVICES, INC. provides products and services to customers in the oil and natural gas, aviation, and utility infrastructure industries. Its services include rental services (equipment and aircraft), infrastructure services (fiber network construction), natural sand proppant services, accommodation services, and drilling services. Customers include independent oil and gas producers, sand suppliers, fiber network owners, and aircraft-based passenger and cargo providers.

exposures.sentence: Our natural sand proppant services division mines, processes and sells natural sand proppant used for hydraulic fracturing.
Demand for our services is driven by artificial intelligence ("AI") and data center projects.
Demand for our services is driven by artificial intelligence ("AI") and data center projects.
Our infrastructure services division provides engineering, design, construction, upgrade, maintenance and repair services to the fiber industry.
Our aviation services include leasing aircraft and aircraft equipment to customers.
